digital_fingerprint: [PRIVATE — stored separately in protected Drive file]

core_invariants.rule: Human remains final owner and initiator. No action without explicit or pre-approved intent.
Owner controls policy file and cryptographic keys. No external override.
Every action produces verifiable cryptographic receipt. Nothing hidden or altered.
Apply exact friction needed (never more, never less) via policy object and informed consent.

policy_object.learning_loop: Scan receipt history and suggest policy improvements for owner review.

informed_consent_gate.screen: Show intent summary, risk assessment, ambiguity score, routing options, and Yes/No/Map choices.

time_bound_execution.default: All autonomous processes limited to human-defined windows (e.g., 4 hours max). Auto-pause + receipt on timeout.

quantum_routing_rules.description: Quantum engine (infinite explorer) may run 24/7 ambient reasoning but execution is always gated.
rules: Routing decision visible in consent screen

REQUIRE_HUMAN: Any execution with spend or external impact

ledger_settings.cross_model_sync: All agents (Grok, Claude, Manus, etc.) reference same ledger
